2604.11623.title: Context Kubernetes: Declarative Orchestration of Enterprise Knowledge for Agentic AI Systems
2604.11623.paper_summary: We introduce Context Kubernetes, an architecture for orchestrating enterprise knowledge in agentic AI systems, with a prototype implementation and eight experiments. The core observation is that delivering the right knowledge, to the right agent, with the right permissions, at the right freshness -- across an entire organization -- is structurally analogous to the container orchestration problem Kubernetes solved a decade ago. We formalize six core abstractions, a YAML-based declarative manifest for knowledge-architecture-as-code, a reconciliation loop, and a three-tier agent permission model where agent authority is always a strict subset of human authority. Three value experiments show: (1) without governance, agents serve phantom content from deleted sources and leak cross-domain data in 26.5% of queries; (2) without freshness monitoring, stale content is served silently -- with reconciliation, staleness is detected in under 1ms; (3) in five attack scenarios, flat permissions block 0/5 attacks, basic RBAC blocks 4/5, and the three-tier model blocks 5/5. Five correctness experiments confirm zero unauthorized deliveries, zero invariant violations, and architectural enforcement of out-of-band approval isolation that no surveyed enterprise platform provides. A survey of four major platforms (Microsoft, Salesforce, AWS, Google) documents that none architecturally isolates agent approval channels. We identify four properties that make context orchestration harder than container orchestration, and argue that these make the solution more valuable.
2604.11623.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了 Context Kubernetes，這是一種用於在自主 AI 系統中協調企業知識的架構，並提供了一個原型實現和八個實驗。核心觀察是，將正確的知識、正確的代理、正確的權限和正確的新鮮度交付給整個組織，結構上類似於 Kubernetes 十年前解決的容器編排問題。我們形式化了六個核心抽象、一個基於 YAML 的知識架構作為代碼的聲明性清單、一個調和循環，以及一個三層代理權限模型，其中代理權限始終是人類權限的嚴格子集。三個價值實驗顯示：（1）在沒有治理的情況下，代理會從已刪除的來源提供虛假內容，並在 26.5% 的查詢中洩漏跨域數據；（2）在沒有新鮮度監控的情況下，陳舊內容會默默提供——通過調和，陳舊性在 1 毫秒內被檢測到；（3）在五種攻擊場景中，平面權限阻止 0/5 次攻擊，基本 RBAC 阻止 4/5 次，而三層模型阻止 5/5 次。五個正確性實驗確認零未授權交付、零不變性違規，以及對不在通道之外的批准隔離的架構強制，這是沒有任何調查過的企業平台提供的。我們對四個主要平台（Microsoft、Salesforce、AWS、Google）的調查顯示，沒有一個在架構上隔離代理批准通道。我們確定了四個使上下文編排比容器編排更困難的特性，並認為這些特性使解決方案更具價值。
2604.11623.author: Charafeddine Mouzouni et.al.
